problems.evidence_headline: Vancouver construction sector faces labor shortages amid housing push
Interest rates hold steady as Bank of Canada watches inflation
Supply chain delays hit Vancouver port, affecting local business
City streamlines permit process for new housing developments

ai_matches.recommended_approach: Pilot in target neighbourhoods; partner with local suppliers.
Align 30-day actions with quick wins; measure and iterate.
Engage early with local permits; document assumptions.

actions: Map key stakeholders and decision makers
Run pilot or proof of concept
Scale or roll out next phase

roi_notes.ranges: 15–25% improvement in target metric within 6–12 months
assumptions: Pilot conversion rates hold at scale
